docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY ARMAS, PANFILO AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.50 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,152.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
